seoTitle: Old Cooranga vs Old Talgai — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Old Cooranga and Old Talgai. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Old Cooranga vs Old Talgai: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Old Cooranga and Old Talgai.
heading: Old Cooranga vs Old Talgai — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Old Cooranga, Queensland and Old Talgai, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Old Talgai has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Old Cooranga (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Old Cooranga or Old Talgai safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Old Cooranga has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Old Talgai scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Old Cooranga scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Old Talgai scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Old Cooranga or Old Talgai?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Old Talgai has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
